.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #1e2537 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#1e2537, color-mix(in srgb, #1e2537 65%, transparent))
body.--lucide-calendar-days: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3E%3Crect x='3' y='4' width='18' height='18' rx='2' ry='2'%3E%3C/rect%3E%3Cline x1='16' y1='2' x2='16' y2='6'%3E%3C/line%3E%3Cline x1='8' y1='2' x2='8' y2='6'%3E%3C/line%3E%3Cline x1='3' y1='10' x2='21' y2='10'%3E%3C/line%3E%3Cpath d='M8 14h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M12 14h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M16 14h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M8 18h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M12 18h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M16 18h.01'%3E%3C/path%3E%3C/svg%3E")
body.--lucide-maximize: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3E%3Cpath d='M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M21 8V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-3'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3'%3E%3C/path%3E%3Cpath d='M16 21h3a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-3'%3E%3C/path%3E%3C/svg%3E")
body.--lucide-minus: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3E%3Cline x1='5' y1='12' x2='19' y2='12'%3E%3C/line%3E%3C/svg%3E")
body.--lucide-x: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3E%3Cline x1='18' y1='6' x2='6' y2='18'%3E%3C/line%3E%3Cline x1='6' y1='6' x2='18' y2='18'%3E%3C/line%3E%3C/svg%3E")
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #1e2537 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#1e2537, color-mix(in srgb, #1e2537 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(163, 190, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(17, 19, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(17, 19, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[data-task=\"-\"].mask-image: url("data:image/svg+xmlutf8,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='24' height='24' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'%3E%3Cline x1='5' y1='12' x2='19' y2='12'%3E%3C/line%3E%3C/svg%3E")

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(255, 71, 90) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(255, 120, 141) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(17, 19, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
